Internal Memo—Confidential: Board Compliance Briefing — Qiluo Digital Holdings Co., Ltd. (issuer candidate, S S E STAR Market)
Subject: Non-public updates on cyber incident and carbon-credit token pilot; PIPL/CSL/DSL implications and CAC cross-border filing readiness.
Per C S R C guidance and SSE Listing Rules, a blackout window for directors and designated employees is in effect 2026-06-01 to 2026-06-22; insider-list “Project Lantern” is updated in DocSafe Dataroom.
Ms. Lin Ya—General Counsel (contact: lin.ya@qiluo-holdings.example; ext 6291)—and Mr. Zhou Qi (外部保荐代表人) supervise information barriers; no selective disclosure to suppliers or banks is permitted.
Cyber: on 2026-05-30 we detected unauthorized access via AuroraEdge Gateway v3.2; logs suggest limited metadata exfiltration; incident graded II per CSL, CAC notice draft prepared but not publicly disclosed.
PIPL: employee personal data implicated includes hashed mobile numbers and masked resident IDs (e.g., 44************23X); no minors under 14 identified; do not email raw logs.
Company identifiers: USCC (统一社会信用代码) 91-8Xo3-0 0 9 7 2 1 9 9 (fictional), internal issuer code LNT-Σ/2026, and hr payroll acct: QBK-***-**71; store under DSL ‘important data’ vault.
Crypto/ESG: the private-chain carbon-offset token pilot (LanternChain) with GreenStep EnviroTech Ltd. contemplates a 3-year offtake at RMB 68–74/tonne CO2e and a make-whole floor; this term sheet is non-public MNPI.
PBoC sandbox liaison has not approved external settlement in digital payment tokens; any tipping or informal marketing is prohibited until C S R C pre-filing is accepted.
Cross-border: sample telemetry to be transferred to our SG SOC is subject to CAC 安全评估; use https://intra.qiluo/.well-known/cac?ticket=7a9e-PII-xx for tracking; redact PII prior to export.
Employment workflows: offer letters for pre-IPO hires must include PIPL consents and acknowledgement of trading restrictions; contractors added to insider list require attestations every 30 days.
For educational purposes only: the marketing team will host a webinar explaining what an information barrier is and how insider lists support compliance, using only public-source examples.
Project management note: finalize room permissions, label clean team, schedule vendor ESG audit workshop; not a MAC and not price-sensitive in itself.
Public references: see C S R C 官方问答(公开版) and CAC 指引(公开稿); do not rely on social media posts for disclosure determinations.
Please report suspected leaks via compliance@qiluo-holdings.example or secure chat ql-compliance://room/insider; if urgent, call +86-20-0000-0000 (test line).
Obfuscated insider sample entry: Lin, Ya (ID: 32******781X), Zhou, Qi (ID: 51******09 2 X); added 2026/05/28 14:03; see S Z S E form 3-8 mock.
